eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Boundary, ID; at 9:54 PM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 1:54 AM JUL 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Boundary County Sheriff's Office has issued an immediate wildfire evacuation order for the following areas in Bonners Ferry.: Turner's Hill Road from the 3000 block to highway 95. All Holmes Rd. Addresses. All Kings row road addresses and any side roads. All Fleming Creek Road addresses and any side roads. Contact Boundary County Sheriff's Office for further information.
